name: Pudding Tornado
recipeIngredient: 1 package JELL-O Instant Pudding and Pie Filling, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon the thawed COOL-WHIP into 6 dessert glasses.
2. Spread the COOL-WHIP onto the bottom and up the sides of each glass.
3. Prepare the JELL-O pudding according to package instructions using 2% lowfat milk.
4. Let the prepared JELL-O pudding stand for 5 minutes.
5. Spoon the pudding into the center of each "cloud."
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
